subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-10-14 in San Francisco
subcodes.first_line: Welcome, very welcome! Praise be to God that he confirmed me to come here to see you, for I had the greatest longing to see the friends in America
subcodes.subjects: @war and peace, @independent investigation of truth; reality, @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual transformation, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @call to action
